overview: Farm72 is a premium e-commerce website for pure cold-pressed oils and Buransh Juice, featuring SEO optimization, a dedicated Buransh Juice benefits page, customer star ratings on all products, and image lazy loading for fast performance.
features: SEO meta tags and JSON-LD structured data on all pages
Image lazy loading for faster page load
Dedicated Buransh Juice benefits landing page
Customer star ratings and reviews on product pages
FAQ, Refund Policy, and Terms pages
